title: The SauceLand Mod
description: Just a mod made for the wonderful people at SauceLand!
body:
# Wait... a SauceLand Mod?
Yes! a SauceLand Mod! featuring two "Unobtainable" Currencies Known as the Tomato Token and the carrot credit! both with a denomination and a block form, A Wogo Taco™; a delishious and hearty taco from ¡Wogos Tacos! All with compatibility with both the mod Farmers Delight and Create!

## Why?
thought it would be fun to make as a first mod.

## Features! (so far)
1. Both the Tomato Token and Carrot Credit!
2. The Wogo Taco™
3. Frogge's Pizza
4. Brensanitizer Effect

### Tomato Token, Seed and Block
![Sprites made by SomeLunatic](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c71d7c0cfb48d375bfe4fa4554c5281ff7cc154.png)

### Carrot Credit, Coin and Block
![These ones can Glow!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/31796c87e21242a68dce20e6bd60088c5537f0c3.png)

## Requires (On Fabric)
[Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api)

[Farmer's Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight-refabricated)

## NeoForge
[Farmer's Delight]([https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight/version/1.21.1-1.2.7](https://modrinth.com/mod/farmers-delight/version/1.21.1-1.2.7))
